daily.today_energy: The universe is giving you permission to be a little selfish today. Your vibe is magnetic and unbothered—lean into whatever makes you feel most authentically you, even if it's unconventional.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's romantic or platonic, there's genuine interest brewing. Trust your gut if something feels worth exploring.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is prime time to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or speak up in spaces where you usually stay quiet. Your perspective has real value.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever brings joy rather than obligation. Rest isn't laziness; it's strategic recovery.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about recalibrating your inner compass. Mercury's moving in your favor, making it easier to articulate what's been living in your head rent-free. Trust the quiet nudges—they're pointing you somewhere real.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, deeper conversations are flowing naturally. Single? Someone might mirror your vibe soon, but the real magic is in how you're showing up for yourself first. That energy shift hits different.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different right now. Don't dim them down—the universe is asking you to take up space with your vision. Collaboration could unlock something you've been stuck on.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Whether that's dancing, walking, or stretching, listen to what energizes rather than drains you. Rest when you need it, no guilt attached.
